gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands tall, opens both arms wide, and smiles while introducing the topic of multiplication
a person tilts their head slightly, brings hands together, and gestures outward as they explain the concept of adding groups
a tutor takes a step forward, holds up two fingers on one hand, and gestures with the other hand to indicate three
a person points to an imaginary grid in front of them while illustrating the idea of an array with two rows and three columns
a tutor leans slightly forward, looks around the room encouragingly, and raises both hands as if inviting students to create their arrays
a person claps their hands together, steps back, and encourages discussion by gesturing toward the students with enthusiasm
a tutor raises both hands, spreads them apart, and nods confidently while stating that two times three equals six
a person claps their hands joyfully, smiles widely, and gestures to the class while praising their understanding of multiplication
